name: Curried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse chicken, pat dry; dredge in flour.
3. Spray a large non-stick skillet with vegetable spray; heat over medium-high.
4. Add chicken and cook just until brown, turning and browning the other side.
5. Put chicken in a medium-sized shallow casserole.
6. In the skillet over low heat, cook onion in 1 T water for 5 minutes.
7. Add apple and cook for 1 minute.
8. Spoon the mixture over the chicken; sprinkle with spices (curry powder, ground ginger, turmeric, salt, pepper).
9. Pour broth over everything.
10. Bake, covered, for 55 minutes or until tender.
11. Add raisins and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
